judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; it correctly characterizes `/llms-full.txt` as a monolithic all-docs file that is not sharded by group; and it lists well more than two valid optional frontmatter fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). Minor concern: it invents a few fields not in the rubric list (deprecatedReason, availableIn, description), but these are presented alongside many valid ones, so the required criteria are still met.
